name: what-every-body-is-saying-an-ex-fbi-agents-guide-to-speed-reading-people
description: Joe Navarro's What Every Body Is Saying: An Ex-FBI Agent's Guide to Speed-Reading People — a body language and nonverbal communication toolkit for reading people's true feelings and intentions by observing their limbic system responses: feet, legs, torso, arms, hands, and face signals.
useCase: Learn to read people's nonverbal signals — detect discomfort, confidence, deception, and interest through limbic-driven body language cues.
knownRisks: No single cue proves deception or emotion — context and baseline are essential
Overconfidence in body reading can lead to false accusations or misinterpretation
Cultural differences affect body language — what means confidence in one culture may mean disrespect in another
